title: Shikimori's Not Just a Cutie Custom GUI Pack
description: Shikimori's Not Just a Cutie Custom GUI Pack
body: **![](https://i.imgur.com/olk0kvd.png)** **Introduction:** This GUI-only resource pack is themed after the show "Shikimori's Not Just a Cutie." You can use it alongside other resource packs by placing it on top of your existing pack. I've customized various UI elements and experimented with different images for each container. The palette features blue, pink, and orange. If you have color suggestions for future updates, such as red and white or other combinations, let me know! **Community Feedback:** Feel free to leave comments below or report any bugs you encounter so I can address them promptly. [ ](https://listar-mc.net/) [ ](https://listar-mc.net/) **Feature Highlights:** - **Hud:** ![Hud](https://i.imgur.com/E65v8KA.png) - **Settings:** ![Settings](https://i.imgur.com/7TEzpGS.png) - **Anvil:** ![Anvil](https://i.imgur.com/JtVjngb.png) - **Crafting Table:** ![Crafting Table](https://i.imgur.com/lPhIqGg.png) - **Furnace:** ![Furnace](https://i.imgur.com/RlP7OaV.png) - **Chest:** ![Chest](https://i.imgur.com/6CTS3sH.png) - **Shulker Box:** ![Shulker Box](https://i.imgur.com/8g12lcl.png) - **Loom:** ![Loom](https://i.imgur.com/Bkzb4jM.png) - **Cartography Table:** ![Cartography Table](https://i.imgur.com/G4aSdHl.png) - **Beacon Menu:** ![Beacon Menu](https://i.imgur.com/K5kAmlS.png) **Additional Resources:** - Check out our relaunch on [ListarMC](https://listarmc.com/) - [Join our Discord](https://discord.gg/RvScgzj3Ph) to suggest and vote for future packs or participate in discussions **Thank you for your support! ❤️**
